name: kimi-quota
description: Query Kimi Code quota: weekly usage, 5-hour rate limit, and Extra Usage balance

interface.shortDescription: Check your weekly quota, 5h rolling limit, and Extra Usage wallet
interface.longDescription: Exposes a `get_quota` MCP tool that calls the official Kimi Code usage API and returns your weekly usage, 5-hour rolling rate-limit status, and Extra Usage (booster wallet) balance. Install, enable, then ask the agent "how's my quota" or "check my usage".
